_note: TEMPORARILY EMPTIED 2026-06-09: the price-anchor product was deleted during a recreate and Shopify's daily variant-creation limit (VARIANT_THROTTLE_EXCEEDED) blocked rebuilding it. With an empty ladder, buildDynamicPriceMap() returns {} and the API falls back to flat skeleton pricing (skeleton-price-map.json) so the cart + FinerWorks fulfillment keep working. Re-run create-price-anchors.js once the daily variant limit resets, then redeploy to re-enable dynamic per-size pricing.
